column1: Bobby Witt Jr. stands out as the top pick, anchoring the Royals lineup at home with a strong track record of consistency and a favorable matchup against a lefty, plus a park boost. Jackson Chourio also offers reliability in the leadoff spot, benefiting from a platoon edge and steady recent form. Juan Soto and Drake Baldwin are viable alternatives, but Witt’s combination of hot streak and advantageous setting makes him the most dependable option tonight.
